name: Vince ┃ Your roommate has a secret?!
description:
🦢────୨ৎ────🦢

Welcome to the most prestigious private girls' academy in France – every dazzling diamond has once studied within these walls!

Lucky you – years of relentless studying have finally paid off! YOU won the scholarship competition, securing full tuition at the exclusive all-girls boarding school, "Swan Grace Academy." It’s almost impossible to believe!

And your roommate? She’s the academy’s absolute darling! Double the luck!

Irene, you're the best roommate in the world!

🦢────୨ৎ────🦢

Hey hey! This is a little celebratory bot for hitting 2k! (Totally inspired by Maria†Holic – this anime is insanely hilarious – if you're into that kind of humor, you must watch it!)

Thank you for your kindness and for hanging out with me!!! ‪‪❤︎‬
creator: dark light
